calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-28-2014 Off Calendar

Motion Requesting A Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-07-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: John Dearman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Marrianne B. Sioson, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, ADERBAL OLIVIERA.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) THOMAS KIDWELL.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.
Plaintiff Aderbal Oliveira sworn and examinded on his own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $13,350.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $1,510.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $14,860
Judgment signed in open court.
